title: schizeilema fragoseum
intro: Schizeilema fragoseum, also known as the fragrant schizeilema or kawakawa, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich concentration of compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Schizeilema fragoseum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
